examples: But the monotonous black space can bore, tire and disorient the visitor.
I worried whether the barrage of shattering surprises would disorient you.
The Back button will actually work, and that experience will disorient some users.
Hard cuts and swooping camera moves can disorient viewers new to 3D.
Presumably, these stylistic techniques are supposed to disorient the viewer, mimicking the sensory overload that travelers since Mark Twain have noted upon arrival on the subcontinent.
